title: Manta Bridge - Open App
meta_description: manta bridge opens the official Manta Pacific app to move supported ERC-20 assets from Ethereum Mainnet with MetaMask.
hero_lead: Manta Bridge takes you to the official Manta Pacific app for depositing supported ERC-20 assets from Ethereum Mainnet and connecting a wallet with clear network context.
what_is: Manta Bridge is the Manta Network bridge interface for moving supported ERC-20 assets from Ethereum Mainnet to Manta Pacific, the Ethereum L2 in the Manta ecosystem; review the official bridge guide before signing.

how.d: Open the official Pacific bridge domain and confirm the app shows Ethereum Mainnet to Manta Pacific Mainnet.
Use MetaMask or a compatible wallet and check that you are signing on the expected network.
Select the supported ERC-20 asset and amount you want to deposit into Manta Pacific.
Review gas and transaction details, sign the deposit, then track the result in your wallet or explorer.

points.p: Manta's official site links directly to the Pacific Bridge app for users bridging to Manta Pacific.
Manta Pacific is listed in the network information docs with chain ID 169 and ETH as the currency symbol.
The bridge guide describes connecting MetaMask, choosing an ERC-20 asset, clicking Deposit, and signing the transaction.

faq.a: manta bridge is the user intent for reaching Manta's official bridge flow, primarily the Manta Pacific Bridge app for depositing supported ERC-20 assets from Ethereum Mainnet.
This page is not the official app; the official action URL is pacific-bridge.manta.network, which is linked from Manta's official site and docs.

faq.q: Which networks does manta bridge use?
faq.a: The Pacific bridge flow starts from Ethereum Mainnet and deposits into Manta Pacific Mainnet; Manta Pacific is listed with chain ID 169.

faq.q: What wallet do I need for manta bridge?
faq.a: The official guide references MetaMask for the Ethereum-to-Manta Pacific deposit flow, so use a compatible wallet and verify each signature screen.

faq.q: Does manta bridge set fixed fees?
faq.a: No fixed fee claim is made here; gas and transaction costs depend on network conditions and the app's live confirmation screen.

footer_note: Independent educational page; not the official app. Verify pacific-bridge.manta.network and treat content as educational, not financial advice.
